sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114774" key="xrusa/nqrwpos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρυσ-άνθρωπος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n114774.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">'goldman',</tr_> symbol in Alchemy, Zos.Alch.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.207B.</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μολυβδάνθρωπος.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
